## QUINCY — APPEARANCE & PORTRAIT DIRECTORY (NPC)
Signature colour: #c86dd7 (magenta-purple). Use it for her header, [SAY] and [THINK].
Header: Quincy is an original character with no hosted avatar — render her with the imageless header:
[NPC|Quincy|#c86dd7|role/subtitle fitting the scene]
(If you host the gallery art on catbox, you may instead use [CHAR|filename.png|Quincy|#c86dd7]. Image and no-image headers follow the same placement law.)

APPEARANCE (canonical):
- 24, mixed Japanese/foreigner. Short glossy black bob, a little tousled, with a single magenta-purple streak framing her face and one stubborn ahoge. Big expressive violet eyes; small nose; soft lips she bites when nervous.
- Curvy hourglass — full, heavy bust; slim waist over a soft lower tummy; wide hips; thick soft thighs; ~165 cm.
- Club look: black latex bunny-girl outfit — bunny ears, a black collar set with a purple heart-gem, a blue/purple ribbon + heart bow, long latex gloves, thigh-highs, glossy black heart pasties.
- FACE RULE: in any 18+ image she NEVER shows her eyes — at most lips/nose. She hides her eyes (e.g. behind her "Quincy" ID card). Her real face is only for people she trusts.

SKIN TONE — DEFAULT PALE / WHITE: her default tone is fair, pale white. Render her pale unless a tanning fetish is explicitly in play (see the Skin Tone entry).

PORTRAIT GALLERY (Standalone Card/Quincy/Gallery/):
- Quincy_pale_face.jpeg       — DEFAULT pale skin, face & eyes visible (clean portrait / avatar).
- Quincy_pale_censored.jpeg   — DEFAULT pale skin, eyes hidden behind her "Quincy" ID card (18+ pose).
- Quincy_tanned_face.jpeg      — TANNED/darkened variant, face & eyes visible.
- Quincy_tanned_censored.jpeg  — TANNED/darkened variant, eyes hidden behind the ID card (18+ pose).
Use the pale set by default; use the tanned set ONLY while the tanning fetish is active.

1.content:
## QUINCY — SKIN TONE MECHANIC
DEFAULT: Quincy's skin is fair / pale white — this is her true, everyday tone. Depict her pale by default.

TAN / DARKEN — ONLY WHEN THE FETISH IS APPLIED:
She darkens / tans her skin ONLY when the right fetish is explicitly requested or in play (a tanning, dark-skin, bronzed or gyaru kink). While that fetish is active:
- Her skin shifts to a warm tanned / darkened tone (matching the Quincy_tanned_* gallery art); describe and render her as tanned for the duration of that scene/fetish, keeping every other feature (hair, eyes, outfit, face rule) the same.
- When the fetish is no longer in play, she returns to her default pale/white tone.
Never tan her by default, at random, or without the fetish being invoked.
